item.title: in then, ati, you done pink the ereal
item.description:
in then, ati, you done pink the ereal
relates into white supremacy and racial supremacy, then you are out of your mind#greenscreenvideo

item.title: Of course it would be ideal for humanitarian aid to be given without any conditions but as a matter of fact it is not and there ...
item.description:
Of course it would be ideal for humanitarian aid to be given without any conditions but as a matter of fact it is not and there is a reason we do not give it three third-party but we insist on doing it ourselves and at times it is better that we are just honest as Trump is being right now

item.title: I keep getting asked why I am targeting the United Arab Emirates so much, here’s why
item.description:

item.title: Wow, I wonder why the country that hosts a bunch of other European countries to do government and it has Europeans in it?
item.description:
Wow, I wonder why the country that hosts a bunch of other European countries to do government and it has Europeans in it? I wonder why the city that host the European Parliament doesn’t just have one European country in it.#greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: They are attempting to perform normalcy but they are in fact performing brutality
